---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the pain point or limitation.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. If it's a new snippet, paste the prompt text.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Links, references, or screenshots that might help.
